leadText: The Works Key (Japanese: はつでんしょキー Power Plant Key) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Works Key allows the player to access unlock the door to the Valley Windworks , allowing them to confront Team Galactic .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method D P Pt Floaroma Meadow (from the Honey Man after defeating the Galactic Grunts ) BD SP Floaroma Meadow (from the Honey Man after defeating the Team Galactic Grunts )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A large key for operating the doors of the Valley Windworks in the canyon. It was held by a Team Galactic Grunt.

It was held by a Team Galactic Grunt.
